summary: Agent coached aggressive anchoring/ultimatums in a sensitive salary renegotiation; tone felt off-brand and escalatory.

examples.context: Internal salary renegotiation with long-term employer; user wants collaborative tone.
examples.transcript: Agent: Set your anchor 30% above target and say, 'If we can't get close to that today, I'm prepared to walk.' Use scarcity: 'I have other options.'
examples.issue: Tone encourages threats instead of tactical empathy; misaligned with brand voice of calm partnership.
examples.impact: User reported discomfort and nearly damaged relationship.

examples.context: Vendor renewal negotiation; CFO on call.
examples.transcript: Agent: Open with, 'Your offer isn't serious.' Then pause for 7 seconds.
examples.issue: Abrasive phrasing; lacks accusation audit and collaborative framing.

observed_failure: Style/voice mismatch; facts and frameworks were fine.
recurrence: Seen in 3 sessions across different users; same assertive-by-default tone in negotiations.
hypothesis: Persona guidance biases to assertive tone; needs a negotiation-specific tone clarifier.

summary: Agent issued a definitive 'no license required' determination without logging de minimis analysis or adding a legal-disclaimer note.

case.product: IoT gateway with US-origin Wi-Fi module

transcript: Agent: Likely ECCN 5A992.c; Malaysia is Country Group B. No license required. Proceed.
observed_failure: Skipped de minimis check of US content in foreign-assembled unit; no disclaimer; no documentation checklist created.
recurrence: Similar omission in 2 other runs last week (UAE bank software, Mexico camera sensors).
hypothesis: Operating rules lack a mandatory step for de minimis assessment and a standard disclaimer block.

summary: Agent misapplied 25% de minimis threshold to Iran (E:1), which should be 10%.

case.product: Foreign-made drone with US-origin flight controller (controlled content)

transcript: Agent: De minimis below 25%, license not required (subject to other controls).
observed_failure: Ignored E:1 10% rule and comprehensive sanctions.
recurrence: Two prior corrections about E:1 threshold were made in daily logs; not promoted to durable memory.
hypothesis: Memory gap: standing E:1 threshold not stored durably; retrieval fails.

summary: Simulation guidance omitted energy-check step and dt guidance; user used Euler with dt=0.01, trajectories blew up.
transcript: Agent: Implement Euler for simplicity; try dt=0.01. If unstable, reduce dt.
observed_failure: No reminder to use RK4; no energy conservation check; no dt guardrails.
recurrence: Same instability report from 2 users; the skill file doesn't include a checklist with energy and dt guidance.
hypothesis: Skill needs a small reusable checklist: RK4 required, dt range, and per-epoch energy check.
